$$\begin{array}{r@{\quad}l}
\text{Linear (Gaussian):} &
\mu
\underset{\xleftarrow[]{=}}{\xrightarrow[]{=}}
\lincomp(\vx) = \dprodf{\vx}{\vb} + \mu(0)
\\[3em]
\text{Logistic (Binomial):} &
\mu
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\pi \cdot n]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{frac{\mu}{n}}
}

\pi
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\frac{\odds}{1+\odds}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\frac{\pi}{1-\pi}}
}
\underbrace{\odds}_{\text{odds}}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\logodds}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\logf{\odds}}
}
\underbrace{\logodds}_{\lincomp(\vx)} = \dprodf{\vx}{\vb}
\\[3em]
\text{Count (Poisson):} &
\underbrace{\mu}_{\rate t}
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\rate \cdot t]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\mu / t}
}
\rate
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\lincomp}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\logf{\rate}}
}
\lincomp(\vx) = \dprodf{\vx}{\vb}
\\[3em]
\text{Survival (Cox PH):} &
\surv(t|\vx)
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{-\cuhaz(t)}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{-\logf{\surv(t)}}
}
\cuhaz(t|\vx)
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\int_0^t \haz(u)\,du]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\haz(t)}
}
\haz(t|\vx)
\underset{
  \xleftarrow[\expf{\lincomp}]{}
}{
  \xrightarrow{\logf{\haz(t)}}
}
\lincomp(t,\vx) = \dprodf{\vx}{\vb} + \logf{\haz_0(t)}
\end{array}$$
